message: Collection copy allocation charges now widen element counts before addition and multiplication in interpreter and compiled runtime paths.

Verifier rejected 4b63627: map.set absent-key path still computes typedMap.Values.Count + 1 as int before widening in CollectionOperations.cs and CompiledRuntime.cs, so int.MaxValue count can wrap before AllocationBytes and under-account instead of deterministic QuotaExceeded. Failed verifier: Noether the 2nd.
Map-set allocation accounting now passes source count and added count separately into the widened allocation helper, avoiding int overflow before quota accounting.
